key.name: position-x
key.description: X coordinate of the widget on the primary monitor. Set to -1 to auto-position (bottom-right corner). Default: 20 (top-left corner on 1920×1080).

key.name: position-y
key.description: Y coordinate of the widget on the primary monitor. Set to -1 to auto-position (bottom-right corner). Default: 20 (top-left corner on 1920×1080).

key.name: pinned
key.description: When enabled, the widget cannot be dragged. Disable to freely move the widget.

key.name: margin
key.description: Minimum distance from screen edges when auto-positioning or clamping the widget position.

key.name: update-interval
key.description: How often the metrics are refreshed, in milliseconds. Lower values give smoother graphs but use more CPU.
